name: Planet Green Holdings Corp.
summary: Planet Green Holdings Corp. is a Nevada holding company headquartered in Flushing, NY, conducting operations through subsidiaries in the PRC and Canada. The company engages in diverse business activities including consumer products, chemical products, and online advertising. Key subsidiaries include Jingshan Sanhe (new energy technologies), Hubei Shengsili Biotechnology, Xianning Bozhuang (tea products), Shandong Yunchu (supply chain), Shanghai Shuning (advertising), and Fast Approach Inc. (online advertising in Canada).

products.name: Chemical Products
products.description: Chemical products sold through subsidiaries including Bless Chemical and related entities.

products.name: Tea Products
products.description: Tea products produced and sold by Xianning Bozhuang Tea Products Co., Ltd.

products.name: New Energy Technologies
products.description: New energy technology products produced by Jingshan Sanhe Luckysky New Energy Technologies Co., Ltd.

products.name: Online Advertising
products.description: Online advertising services provided by Fast Approach Inc. in Canada and Shanghai Shuning in China.

products.name: Supply Chain Services
products.description: Supply chain services provided by Shandong Yunchu Supply Chain Co., Ltd.

products.name: Biotechnology Products
products.description: Biotechnology products produced by Hubei Shengsili Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
